data.title: Southern Copper and Nvidia are among 10 new top-rated growth stocks added to IBD watchlists.
data.description: Discover the latest additions to IBD's prestigious growth stock lists, including Southern Copper Stock and Nvidia among the ten new entries. Explore which top-rated stocks have secured a place on these watchlists that track the most promising growth opportunities in the market.

data.title: Tesla's earnings dropped by 17%. Elon Musk plans Robotaxi expansion with huge CapEx as Model S, X to be discontinued. Stock below key levels.
data.description: Following a late Wednesday report on earnings, Tesla's stock is currently situated below significant levels. The earnings of Tesla decreased by 17%, with CEO Elon Musk envisioning an expansion in Robotaxi services and a substantial capital expenditure as Model S and X are expected to be discontinued.

data.title: Playfly Sports appoints Chris Marinak as President, leveraging his MLB experience for growth. - Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: Playfly Sports has recently bolstered its leadership team by appointing Chris Marinak, a former Major League Baseball executive. This move comes as Playfly seeks to take advantage of favorable market conditions and propel further growth in the industry. The appointment was announced on January 28, 2026, in New York, positioning Playfly to capitalize on upcoming opportunities. This strategic decision is expected to enhance Playfly's operations and drive its revenue to new heights.

data.title: The International Surface Event awards "What's Hot - Best at tise" 2026 winners.
data.description: The winners of the "What's Hot - Best at tise" 2026 awards have been revealed by The International Surface Event (tise). This prestigious event recognized a total of [number] outstanding products in the surfacing industry. The awards highlight the most innovative and cutting-edge products showcased at tise, bringing attention to the latest trends and developments in the sector. Winners can expect heightened exposure and recognition within the industry for their contributions to advancing surfacing technologies. This recognition serves as a significant achievement for the winners, setting them apart as leaders in innovation and quality within the market.

data.title: UK automotive output down 15.5% in 2025, with 764,715 vehicles produced. Industrial Strategy key to recovery.
data.description: In December and for the fiscal year 2025, car and commercial vehicle manufacturing in the UK experienced a decline in production. Data shows that vehicle production decreased by 15.5% during this period, with a total of 764,715 vehicles manufactured. High-resolution charts displaying this information are accessible through Dropbox at the provided link.

data.title: Atkore Inc. (NYSE: ATKR) declared a quarterly $0.33 per share dividend payable on Feb 27, 2026 to stockholders of record on Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: The Board of Directors of Atkore Inc. announced a cash dividend of $0.33 per share of common stock. This dividend is set to be paid on February 27, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 17, 2026. Atkore Inc. is recognized as a key manufacturer in electrical products catering to commercial, industrial, data center, and solar applications.

data.title: Investment in Doppler's token launch protocol by Pantera Capital, funding amount undisclosed. Automated price discovery on Uniswap v4 platform.
data.description: Pantera Capital has disclosed an investment in Doppler, an automated token price discovery protocol designed for Uniswap v4. The specific amount of funding provided by Pantera Capital has not been revealed.

data.description: Quarterly activity report for the period ending on December 31, 2025, has been released (Appendix 4C). data.title: Panel discusses power of introverted Black women for Black Introvert Week 2026 in Chicago - happening on February 7, 2026, at 10 a.m. CT.
data.description: A panel discussion for Black Introvert Week 2026 in Chicago is set to kick off with a focused topic on introverted Black women. The event titled "Depth: The Introverted Black Woman" is scheduled for Saturday, February 7, 2026, starting at 10 a.m. CT. This panel aims to shed light on the power and experiences of introverted Black women.
